content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Titan
description: Legendary Pangolin class mod for Salvador the Gunzerker. Built around Hard to Kill, Out of Bubblegum, I'm the Juggernaut, Locked and Loaded, Asbestos. Focused on survivability with health and shield bonuses.
notes: Requires the Digistruct Peak Challenge DLC.

special.description: At max level: +51% health and +51% shield capacity.
special.title: Challenge accepted.
